# Changelog

> Entries older than 60 days are pruned during dream consolidation.

| Date | Author | Change |
|------|--------|--------|
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Simplified the `SplitInfraCode` multi-repo Git push dialog after the first visual pass: removed the blue top hero/band, removed the colored top accent on the repo card, and reduced the shell to a neutral dialog containing only the repo card content plus validation/cancel actions. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (existing frontend budget / OpenTelemetry warnings unchanged). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `SplitInfraCode` bootstrap preview is now correctly separated in the frontend: the Infra side renders only `infraFileUris`, the Code side renders only `appFileUris`, and the viewer preserves `infra/` / `app/` prefixes when loading file content so each tab reads the right blob bucket. The code side also gained a dedicated `Bootstrap (App)` tab with concise setup/usage guidance. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, targeted IDE error scan on edited frontend files, `gitnexus_detect_changes` (`low`, no affected processes). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Polished the create-project wizard visuals after first rollout: step 2 (`layout-step`) now renders preset icons through `MatIconModule` / `<mat-icon>` instead of raw `material-symbols-outlined` text spans, fixing the fallback where icon names appeared in the cards. The preset cards were rebalanced into a responsive equal-height grid with roomier spacing and a more stable desktop fit. The modal was enlarged from `720px` to `960px` with `maxWidth: 96vw`, and `.ifs-wizard-dialog` now adds scoped stepper-header spacing/wrapping so step labels breathe better. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (0 errors; only pre-existing frontend budget / OpenTelemetry warnings). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | The `SplitInfraCode` multi-repo Git push dialog was visually rebuilt to match the frontend design-system baseline: branded hero header, tokenized repo cards, mode-aware dialog widths (`38rem` single / `68rem` dual) and a dedicated `ifs-multi-repo-push-dialog` panel class to eliminate the strange stretched layout and horizontal overflow seen in infra/code single-mode pushes. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, `gitnexus_detect_changes` (`low`, no affected processes). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | New project creation wizard V1: replaces the single-screen dialog with a 4/5-step Material stepper (Identity → Layout → Environments → Repositories[skipped on MultiRepo] → Review) backed by a new atomic backend endpoint `POST /projects/with-setup` (handler `CreateProjectWithSetupCommandHandler`, contract `CreateProjectWithSetupRequest` with nested `EnvironmentSetupRequest`/`RepositorySetupRequest`, Mapster mapping in `ProjectMappingConfig`). Repository connection details (`ProviderType`/`RepositoryUrl`/`DefaultBranch`) and environment `SubscriptionId` are all optional ("configure later" pattern; backend uses `Guid.Empty` sentinel for missing subscription, all-or-nothing rule for repo connection details enforced both client- and server-side). New `IsConfigured` computed property on `ProjectRepository` exposed through `ProjectRepositoryResult`/`ProjectRepositoryResponse`. New `Errors.GitRouting.RepositorySlotNotConfigured` guards `RepositoryTargetResolver` so unconfigured slots can't be pushed to. Frontend wizard lives under `src/Front/src/app/features/projects/create-project-wizard/` (5 step components + `create-project-wizard-draft.service.ts` persisting in `sessionStorage` key `ifs:create-project-draft`, debounced). Quick Start button pre-fills defaults and jumps to Review. Resume-draft banner on reopen, Esc/X intercepted with abandon-confirm when draft is non-empty. Both `home.component.ts` and `projects.component.ts` open the new wizard (720px / 90vh / `ifs-wizard-dialog` / `disableClose: true`). Old `home/create-project-dialog/` deleted. New i18n namespace `PROJECT_CREATE.*` in EN/FR. No EF migration needed (snapshot already had nullable columns). Validation: `dotnet build .\InfraFlowSculptor.slnx` (0 errors), `npm run typecheck` + `npm run build` from `src/Front` (0 errors, only pre-existing OTel CommonJS + budget warnings). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | In `project-detail` split generation mode, the panel no longer exposes a close/hide action. The only remaining control is a collapse/expand button rendered directly in the `SplitInfraCode` Infra/Code header (`split-generation-switcher`), so collapsing hides the content while keeping the split header visible. Non-split project generation keeps a single collapse button only. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (passes; existing frontend budget/CommonJS warnings unchanged). GitNexus impact stayed `LOW` on `SplitGenerationSwitcherComponent` and `ProjectDetailComponent`. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Extracted the 10-step Azure DevOps bootstrap setup guide (Prepare → Run → Permissions → Finalize) into a new standalone `BootstrapSetupGuideComponent` (`src/Front/src/app/features/project-detail/bootstrap-setup-guide/`). The guide is now also rendered in the SplitInfraCode `split-generation-switcher` Bootstrap tab so the explanatory text is visible regardless of the layout preset. The pre-existing inline copy in `project-detail.component.html` (AllInOne flow) is unchanged. Component is i18n-driven (no inputs), uses `MatIconModule`, scoped SCSS imported via `@use "scss/main" as *;`. Validation: `npm run typecheck` + `npm run build` (only pre-existing OTel CommonJS warnings). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | The visible "Generation Results" title was removed from the config/project generation panels, and the new panel-action controls are now anchored directly in the top-right corner of each panel instead of sharing a text header row. Validation: `npm run build` (passes; existing frontend budget/CommonJS warnings unchanged). GitNexus impact remained `LOW` on the touched feature files. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Bootstrap pipeline generation is now split-aware in `LayoutPresetEnum.SplitInfraCode`. New `BootstrapMode` enum (`FullOwner`/`ApplicationOnly`) drives `BootstrapPipelineGenerationEngine`: the infra-side bootstrap remains the unique owner of project-level shared resources (environments + variable groups), the code-side bootstrap only validates them and provisions application pipeline definitions (with a `dependsOn: ValidateSharedResources` job). New `ArtifactKind.BootstrapApplication` is routed to the application-code repo by `RepositoryTargetResolver`. `GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineCommandHandler` now produces two artifact buckets (`infra/`, `app/`) under the same `bootstrap/project/{id}/{ts}/` blob prefix and the response (`GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResult` / `GenerateProjectBootstrapPipelineResponse`) exposes `InfraFileUris`+`AppFileUris` while keeping `FileUris` as a backward-compatible union. `PushProjectBootstrapPipelineToGitCommandHandler` filters to the `infra/` bucket in split mode; `PushProjectArtifactsToMultiRepoCommandHandler` adds the `app/` bootstrap to the code repo push scope. Frontend `split-generation-switcher` now renders a Bootstrap tree under both Infra and Code outer tabs and unlocks `Push code` when an app bootstrap is present. New i18n keys `PROJECT_DETAIL.GENERATION.TAB_BOOTSTRAP_APP` and `SWITCHER.BOOTSTRAP_APP_INFO` (EN/FR), `BOOTSTRAP_INFO`/`INFRA_PUSH_DESC`/`CODE_PUSH_DESC` updated. Validation: `dotnet build` (API + parity tests, 0 errors), `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (existing pre-existing budget/CommonJS warnings unchanged). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `SplitInfraCode` project generation now exposes two dedicated Git push actions in the frontend: one for infra artifacts and one for code pipelines. The split push dialog supports `infra`, `code`, or `both` modes, the old mono-repo toolbar push CTA is hidden for split layouts, and `POST /projects/{id}/push-multi-repo-artifacts-to-git` now accepts either target independently while still supporting the dual push flow. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, targeted IDE error scan on edited backend/frontend files. Full .NET build remained blocked by existing environment/repo-wide issues (`MSB4006` circular dependency after avoiding locked outputs). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | The generation-panel header actions were visually redesigned with a new shared DS control `app-ds-panel-action-button` instead of raw local buttons: collapse/expand now uses a pressed accent state plus cleaner arrow icons, close uses a themed danger action, and both are grouped in glassy header clusters tuned separately for dark (`config-detail`) and light (`project-detail`) surfaces. Validation: `npm run build` (passes; existing bundle/style budget and OpenTelemetry CommonJS warnings unchanged). GitNexus reports `LOW` impact on the two feature files; the DS barrel export itself appears `CRITICAL` at file level because many files import `shared/components/ds/index.ts`, but the change is additive and compiled successfully. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Local `fb8699ea` snapshot rows in `infraDb` were refreshed so both Container Apps now carry their expected assigned user-managed identities and the API Key Vault app setting was restored to `JwtSettings__Secret` / `jwt-secret`, matching current Bicep generation and ASP.NET config binding expectations. Validation: targeted PostgreSQL queries against the local Aspire `postgres:17.6` container before and after the transaction. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `config-detail` and `project-detail` generation panels now expose a dedicated collapse/expand control beside the existing close action, keep the header visible while folded, and auto-expand again on fresh Bicep/Pipeline/Bootstrap generations. Validation: `npm run typecheck`; `gitnexus_detect_changes` reported unrelated pre-existing unstaged backend changes in the worktree, so repo-wide risk stayed `medium`. |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | Dream orchestration now uses an exclusive temp-directory lock and skips already-closed same-day dream gates to prevent concurrent memory rewrites; frontend auth-expiry UX was also hardened so `AxiosService` redirects both backend `401` responses and pre-request token acquisition failures to `/login` without flashing component-level errors. Validation: targeted instruction diff review, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, `gitnexus_detect_changes` (risk `low`, no affected processes). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `config-detail` multi-repo Git setup now matches the project-level layout/repository visual language: `AllInOne` / `SplitInfraCode` use the same preset-card selector and repo-card/slot-empty surfaces, and sub-mode changes update optimistically so the click has immediate visible feedback before the refetch completes. Validation: `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build` (existing bundle/style budget warnings only). |
| 2026-04-25 | dev | `config-detail` now renders the configuration-level `Git` tab only for `MultiRepo` projects; `SplitInfraCode` keeps generation and push flows but no longer shows the per-config repository-management tab. Validation: `npm run typecheck`. |
| 2026-04-24 | dev | Frontend moved to Angular 21 and completed the main Design System rollout: global Material theming, DS buttons/toggles/form controls, `cdkConnectedOverlay` select panels, ACA health-probe card polish, warning cleanup, and broad DS migrations across dialogs, wizards, `resource-edit`, `config-detail`, and `project-detail`. Project-level SplitInfraCode generation was then realigned to restore `Common/` for Bicep and `.azuredevops/Common/...` for pipelines, with matching bootstrap and frontend tree updates. Validation covered `dotnet build` on Application, parity `dotnet test`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npm run build` (same bundle/style budget warnings). |
| 2026-04-23 | dev/copilot | Major multi-repo + generation wave: backend audit fixes (path traversal guard, auth on generation/download, security headers, HSTS, rate limiting, validator sweep, `ValidationBehavior` cleanup, unique role-assignment index, KeyVault FK `SetNull`), layout-driven repository topology (`LayoutPreset`, per-config `LayoutMode`/`InfraConfigRepository`), removal of legacy `GitRepositoryConfiguration` / `RepositoryMode` / `CommonsStrategy` / `RepositoryBinding`, SplitInfraCode dual-repo generation/push and flat Bicep layout, bootstrap ADO pipelines/environments/permissions guidance, many Bicep/pipeline correctness fixes (RBAC grouping and service category, constants union, KV secret ordering, mono-repo PR `Common` checkout, app pipeline split/promote flows, path normalization), frontend multi-repo switcher/push dialog/i18n/storage/SQL/ACR/custom-domain refinements, the local DB repair script, and the ACR RBAC deployment prerequisite note. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Custom domains were implemented end to end; bootstrap Azure DevOps was hardened and documented; mono-repo combined push, existing-resource generation verification, pipeline variable usage fixes, Container App health probes and grouped Bicep parameters, CAE Log Analytics security hardening, DNS-based name availability, resource abbreviation overrides, SQL Server fixes, favicon refresh, snapshot seeding, and Aspire updates all landed. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Bicep generation hardening added secure parameter support, pipeline override wiring, output symbol validation, LAW fallback logic, artifact path sanitization, and module reference disambiguation. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Infra release artifact flow was standardized around `drop` and artifact-relative paths, and the Aspire MCP detection mismatch was documented. |
| 2026-04-17 | copilot | `.bicepparam` files switched to environment short names for filenames while keeping full environment names inside the file payload. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | Cross-cutting platform alignment landed: sealed enum value objects, string DTO ids, `.ProducesProblem(401)`, tag limits, shared role-assignment domain service, repository naming cleanup, camelCase Bicep identifiers, ErrorOr handling alignment, and Aspire decoupling of API DbContext/OTel/health wiring. |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | `main` was merged into the DDD branch, concrete `AzureResource` aggregates were sealed, and audit automation plus GitHub audit issues were refreshed. |
| 2026-04-14 | copilot | Audit automation gained Windows-friendly PowerShell entry points, UTF-8 reads, and no longer requires PowerShell 7. |
| 2026-04-13 | copilot | Draw.io architecture tooling was added and the main architecture diagram was refreshed. |
| 2026-04-04 | copilot | Generation/pipeline stabilization fixed Azure DevOps release issues, unified app pipeline generation into `POST /generate-pipeline`, moved `AgentPoolName` to `Project`, refactored `BicepAssembler`, and corrected FK cascade behavior. |
| 2026-04-03 | copilot | App pipeline generation, GitNexus integration, and several Container App runtime/pipeline fixes landed. |
| 2026-04-02 | copilot | The assigned user-managed identity flow was refactored across domain, CQRS, Bicep, frontend, and diagnostics. |
| 2026-04-01 | copilot | Windows-first conventions were reinforced and general-config i18n/runtime issues were cleaned up. |
| 2026-03-31 | copilot | Event Hub namespace support and the configuration keys UX redesign landed. |
| 2026-03-30 | copilot | ACR pull role assignments, pipeline variable groups, Unit of Work behavior, and domain quality conventions were introduced. |
| 2026-03-29 | copilot | Azure DevOps pipeline YAML generation support was added around `AzureResourceManagerConnection`. |
| 2026-03-28 | copilot | Unified generation UX, mono-repo pipeline support, secret/static app settings, and the architect agent were introduced. |
| 2026-03-27 | copilot | UAI grouping and Storage Account CORS/lifecycle editing were improved. |
| 2026-03-26 | copilot | Storage Account CORS UX and queue/table Bicep generation were redesigned. |
| 2026-03-24 | copilot | Log Analytics Workspace and Application Insights were delivered end to end. |
